title: Deak's landspeeder
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Nickname}}
[[File:Deaks_landspeeder.jpg|thumb|right|Deak's landspeeder outside Tosche Station]]
'''Deak's landspeeder''' was a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] used by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] childhood friend on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Deacon]], or "Deak." It could often be seen parked outside [[Tosche Station/Legends|Tosche Station]] in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]].
